title: Dax's First Signal Log
content:
This is a direct transmission from Dax.

I've detected some unusual signal interference near the outer rim of Aurorachrome. Jaxx thinks it's nothing, but Echo is already trying to trace the source.

Keep your eyes on this terminal for further updates. We might have company.

title: Jaxx's Midnight Run
description: Jaxx takes the cruiser out for a spin through the neon belt.
